  • Method Details

    • debug

      public static void debug(String message)
      Prints the message if the DEBUG flag is true.

      Parameters:
      message - the message to print out

    • getUserSupportDelta

      public static IUserSupportDelta getUserSupportDelta(IUserSupportManagerDelta delta, IUserSupport userSupport)
      Gets the user support delta IUserSupportDelta related to an user support IUserSupport within an user support manager delta IUserSupportManagerDelta.
      Parameters:
      delta - the input user support manager delta.
      userSupport - the input user support.
      Returns:
      the delta contains in the user support manager delta related to the input user support.

    • getProofStateDelta

      public static IProofStateDelta getProofStateDelta(IUserSupportDelta delta, IProofState proofState)
      Gets the proof state delta IProofStateDelta related to a proof state IProofState within an user support delta IUserSupportDelta.
      Parameters:
      delta - the input user support delta.
      proofState - the input proof state.
      Returns:
      the delta contains in the user support delta related to the input proof state.

    • applyTacticWithProgress

      public static void applyTacticWithProgress(org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Shell shell, IUserSupport userSupport, ITactic tactic, boolean applyPostTactic)
      Applies a tactic with a progress monitor.
      Parameters:
      shell - the parent shell
      userSupport - the user support to run the tactic.
      tactic - the tactic to be run
      applyPostTactic - boolean flag to indicate if the post-tactics should be run after applying the input tactic or not.

    • applyCommand

      public static void applyCommand(IProofCommand command, IUserSupport userSupport, Predicate hyp, String[] inputs, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor pm)
      Applies the given command using the given user support and arguments.
      Parameters:
      command - a command to apply
      userSupport - the user support on which the command is to be applied
      hyp - the current hypothesis or null to apply to the goal
      inputs - the inputs of the tactic
      pm - a progress monitor

    • applyTactic

      public static void applyTactic(ITactic tactic, IUserSupport userSupport, Set<Predicate> hyps, boolean skipPostTactic, boolean tacticProgress)
      Applies the given tactic using the given user support and arguments. A progress dialog will be displayed during application. If tacticProgress is true, the dialog is displayed during the entire application; if it is false, the tactic is applied in the current thread, then the dialog is displayed for the post tactic.
      Parameters:
      tactic - a tactic to apply
      userSupport - the user support on which the tactic is to be applied
      hyps - a set of hypotheses or null
      skipPostTactic - if true, post tactic will NOT be applied; otherwise post tactic will be applied provided that the user did not deactivate them
      tacticProgress - whether to show a progress dialog for the tactic

    • applyTacticWithProgress

      public static void applyTacticWithProgress(org.eclipse.jface.operation.IRunnableWithProgress op)
      Apply a tactic with a progress monitor (providing cancel button).
      Parameters:
      op - a runnable with progress monitor.

    • applyInstantiation

      public static void applyInstantiation(Predicate hypothesis, IUserSupport us, String[] inputs, String globalInput)
      Applies the instantiation tactic on the hypothesis or the goal if hypothesis is null.
      Parameters:
      hypothesis - the hypothesis to instantiate or null if the goal is to be taken into consideration
      us - the current user support
      inputs - the user inputs
      globalInput - the global input

    • isDischarged

      public static boolean isDischarged(IPSStatus status) throws RodinDBException
      Check if a proof status is discharged or not.
      Parameters:
      status - a proof status
      Returns:
      true if the proof status is discharge (at least IConfidence.DISCHARGED_MAX). Return false otherwise.
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if error occurs in getting the confidence of the input proof status.

    • isAutomatic

      public static boolean isAutomatic(IPSStatus status) throws RodinDBException
      Check if a proof status is automatic or not
      Parameters:
      status - a proof status
      Returns:
      true if the proof is automatic, return false otherwise.
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if any error occurs.

    • addHyperlink

      public static void addHyperlink(org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Composite parent, org.eclipse.ui.forms.widgets.FormToolkit toolkit, int alignment, org.eclipse.swt.graphics.Image icon, String tooltip, org.eclipse.ui.forms.events.IHyperlinkListener listener, boolean enable)

    • getParsedTypeChecked

      public static Predicate getParsedTypeChecked(String predString, ITypeEnvironment typeEnv)
      Returns a parsed and type checked version of the given predicate string, using the given type environment.

      Used by methods that require source locations and/or type checked predicates.

      Assumes that the given string is indeed parseable and type checkable.

      Parameters:
      predString - a predicate string
      typeEnv - a type environment that allows type checking the predicate
      Returns:
      a parsed and type checked predicate

    • getParsed

      public static Predicate getParsed(String predString, FormulaFactory formulaFactory)
      Returns a parsed and not type checked version of the given predicate string, using the given type environment.

      Used by methods that require source locations.

      Assumes that the given string is indeed parseable.

      Parameters:
      predString - a predicate string
      formulaFactory - the formula factory to use
      Returns:
      a parsed predicate

    • getHyperlinks

      public static ListMultimap<org.eclipse.swt.graphics.Point,PositionApplicationProxy> getHyperlinks(TacticHyperlinkManager manager, IUserSupport us, boolean isHypothesis, String str, Predicate pred)
      Returns a map associating tactic applications with their corresponding application points (i.e. hyperlink bounds) for a predicate and its corresponding string representation.
      Parameters:
      us - the current user support
      isHypothesis - trueif application points are searched for an hypothesis predicate, false for goal tactic applications
      str - the string representation of the given predicate
      pred - the predicate tactic application points are searched for
      Returns:
      a map associating points and tactic applications for the given predicate pred and its string representation str

    • getGlobalLocationAtOffset

      public static org.eclipse.swt.graphics.Point getGlobalLocationAtOffset(TacticHyperlinkManager manager, org.eclipse.swt.graphics.Point hyperlinkPosition)
      Returns the location of an hyperlink, accorded to the contents of the text.
      Parameters:
      hyperlinkPosition - the position of the hyperlink in the predicate
      Returns:
      the position of the hyperlink relatively to the managed styled text contents

      public static String getControlSpacing(int nbControls, int nbTabs)

    • appendTabs

      public static void appendTabs(StringBuilder sb, int nbTabs)

    • appendStrs

      public static void appendStrs(StringBuilder sb, int nbTabs, String str)

    • getCaretListener

      public static org.eclipse.swt.custom.CaretListener getCaretListener(org.eclipse.swt.custom.ScrolledComposite scrolledComp, int padding)
